name: codex-claude-executor
description: Let Codex plan and delegate confirmed implementation work to local Claude Code.

interface.longDescription: Plan implementation work in Codex, confirm permissions, delegate execution to local Claude Code, then review the resulting changes. Supports a claude_write_only mode when Codex should stay in a planner/reviewer role and Claude should perform all code edits.
defaultPrompt: Plan this task, then delegate the confirmed plan to Claude Code.
Have Claude Code execute this plan, then review the changes.
Use claude_write_only when Codex should stay in a planner/reviewer role and Claude should make all code edits.
